name: realityos
description: RealityOS v4 — a computational model of reality with a formally specified, machine-verified core. Substrate (objects/events/relationships/time) + reasoning core (graph, probability, optimization, causal, information, decision) + intelligence layer (truth maintenance, understanding, HTN planning, agents, learned physics, explanation) + rigor layer (12 machine-checked axioms, temporal logic, adaptive algorithm selection with justification, incremental & distributed reasoning, PC-stable causal discovery, plugin SDK, domain packages, benchmark vs baselines with calibration). No LLM in the kernel.
author: STMZ Kinetic <support@stmzkinetic.com>
